texto: Page 158: 'Architecture is team work,' said Sinan. 'Apprenticeship is not.''Why don't you want us to look at each other's drawings? ' Jahan once asked.'Because you'll compare. If you think you are better than the others, you'll be poisoned by hubris. If you think another's better, poisoned by envy. Either way, it is poison.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Elif Şafak que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Page 158: 'Architecture is team work,' said Sinan. 'Apprenticeship is not.''Why don't you want us…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, architecture, historical-fiction, com foco em trabalho e historical-fiction.
